title: rhus trilobata var. pilosissima
intro: Rhus trilobata var. pilosissima, also known as Coyote Brush or Roughleaf Coffee Bush, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Rhus trilobata var. pilosissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or oil.
